scripts.benchmark:write: WRITE_GAS_PROFILE_TO_FILE=true forge test -vv --match-test testBenchmark_ && GAS_RESULTS_FOLDER=gas/results CHAIN_COSTS_FOLDER=gas/chain-costs ts-node gas/script/estimateChainCosts.ts
scripts.coverage: forge coverage > temp-ci_yarn_check-coverage.out && node script/coverage/checkCoverage.js temp-ci_yarn_check-coverage.out && rm temp-ci_yarn_check-coverage.out
scripts.coverage:html: forge coverage --report lcov && genhtml lcov.info -o report --branch-coverage --ignore-errors inconsistent && open report/index.html
